channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Kerb edging smashed or missing at many places along foot/cycle pathway, 14th June
item.description:
Kerb edging smashed or missing at many places along foot/cycle pathway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers from recent works in dangerous positions, 14th June
item.description:
Barriers from recent works in dangerous positions. Knocked over, thrown in water course, thrown in hedgerows.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Unable to see/use style both sides due to hedgerow growth, 14th June
item.description:
Unable to see/use style both sides of road due to hedgerow growth
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury

item.title: Temporary road sign face down in verge, 14th June
item.description:
Temporary road sign face down in verge - this is a trip hazard and would cause damage to verge cutting machincery.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Drain is blocked and rain spills out onto the road, 14th June
item.description:
Between 56 Quat Goose Lane and Home Farm
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Quat Goose Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose manhole or drain cover, 14th June
item.description:
This cover makes a loud cluncking noise everytime a car drives over it, being on the A435 bypass that is a lot of noise. Living close by means not being able to sleep.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 14th June
item.description:
Even more rubbish dumped in the usual location. Why does the council allow this to happen?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Pates Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cement ramp added, 13th June
item.description:
A cement ramp has been added at the back of a shop causing a bump and an obstruction to those possibly in wheel chairs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3A, 3B, New Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Previously reported damage to road not repaired, 13th June
item.description:
Going up the hill from Ethridges house
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A row of potholes , been fixed before but now quite dangerous, 13th June
item.description:
As you exit the McDonald’s | B&M and turn left onto Kingsditch Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsditch Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous Oxide canister, 13th June
item.description:
In picking up a small fly-tip there was a Nitrous Oxide canister (670gm) included. All fly-tipped items except the canister have been bagged and put in our general waste bin. However, I do not know how to dispose of the Nitrous Oxide canister. It is ready for collection by a specialist (?) and is by our green waste bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boddington Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Number of potholes on junction of Lea Road with Moorfield Road, 13th June
item.description:
Number of potholes on junction of Lea Road with Moorfield Road Photo illustrates bad area by junction but also some others but smaller about 5 metres into the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lea Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
